setup._docs: Game setup: how many of each special role to include.

discussion._docs: Controls the discussion phase loop. decay_factor: multiplier applied to a speaker's bid weight each time they speak (lower = less likely to speak again soon). max_assertions_per_day: total assertion slots per day. speaker_weight_decay: unused legacy key. chat_history_window: how many recent chat lines the LLM prompts receive. player_min_actions: minimum player actions before silence penalty triggers. player_max_actions: maximum player actions before domination penalty triggers. global_trust_penalty: flat trust penalty applied to the player for being too quiet. silence_under_fire_penalty: trust penalty when the player refuses to defend against a direct accusation.

engine._docs: All parameters for the deterministic StatEngine. Organized by subsystem.

suspicion._docs: Suspicion matrix update deltas. Each [lo, hi] pair is a randint range scaled by an observer stat. deflect_when_accused: delta when someone deflects instead of answering (scaled by intuition). silence: delta for prolonged silence (scaled by intuition). contradiction: delta when someone contradicts a prior action (scaled by intuition). accused_cleared_innocent: delta when someone accused a coroner-cleared innocent (scaled by logic_vs_emotion). defended_guilty: delta when someone defended a character later revealed guilty (scaled by logic_vs_emotion). ally_defends: suspicion REDUCTION when a trusted ally defends the target. ga_protected: suspicion REDUCTION when GA protection log matches the target. duplicate_claim: delta applied to BOTH claimants when two characters claim the same role (scaled by intuition). intuition_divisor: observer's intuition is divided by this to get the scaling multiplier. logic_emotion_divisor: observer's logic_vs_emotion is divided by this to get the scaling multiplier.

kill._docs: Werewolf night kill target selection. intuition_weight: multiplier for target's intuition stat when scoring threat (high intuition = can detect wolves). default_threat_score: fallback threat score when character data is missing. revealed_role_bonus: extra threat score added for characters who have publicly claimed GA or Coroner (high-value targets for wolves to eliminate).

protect._docs: Guardian Angel night protection target selection. intuition_weight: multiplier for target's intuition stat when scoring protection priority. default_threat_level: fallback threat level when character data is missing. revealed_role_bonus: extra priority score for protecting characters who have publicly claimed a special role (wolves will target them).

assertion._docs: Controls how villagers pick assertion intents. accuse_base_weight: base probability weight for accusing. accuse_low_logic_bonus: extra accuse weight when logic_vs_emotion is below low_logic_threshold (emotional characters accuse more). low_logic_threshold: logic_vs_emotion at or below this is considered 'emotional'. question_base_weight: base probability weight for questioning. question_high_logic_bonus: extra question weight when logic_vs_emotion is at or above high_logic_threshold (logical characters question more). high_logic_threshold: logic_vs_emotion at or above this is considered 'logical'. neutral_min_weight: minimum probability weight for neutral assertions. low_ad_threshold: assertion_drive at or below this is considered 'passive'. low_ad_neutral_bonus: extra neutral weight for passive characters. suspicion_target_threshold: minimum suspicion score before a target is considered for accusation/questioning.

werewolf._docs: Werewolf-specific decision tuning. packmate_defense_divisor: performance/this = chance to defend a packmate (higher = less likely). deflect_performance_threshold: minimum performance to deflect instead of defend_self when accused. reaction_deflect_threshold: minimum performance to deflect in reactions (vs defend_self). reaction_packmate_defense_divisor: performance/this = chance to defend packmate in reactions. reaction_bandwagon_chance: probability of agreeing when an innocent is being accused (pile-on). fake_suspicion_innocent_weight: voting weight for innocents when faking suspicion scores. fake_suspicion_wolf_weight: voting weight for fellow wolves when faking suspicion scores (low = protect pack). voluntary_reveal_performance_threshold: minimum performance to attempt a voluntary fake role claim. voluntary_reveal_chance: probability of a qualifying wolf actually making the fake claim.

reaction._docs: Controls how NPCs decide to react to assertions. disagree_suspicion_threshold: minimum suspicion toward a target before disagreeing with their defender. agree_suspicion_threshold: minimum suspicion toward the accused before agreeing with the accuser. agree_cold_start_trust_threshold: if trust toward the accused is below this, the reactor may agree even without suspicion data. agree_cold_start_chance: probability of cold-start agreement triggering. agree_general_trust_threshold: minimum trust toward the speaker to agree with non-accusation statements. agree_general_chance: probability of general agreement triggering. defend_other_friendly_chance: probability of defending a 'friendly' (55+ trust) ally when they're attacked (allied 75+ always defends).

contrarian._docs: Controls the contrarian disagreement roll. index_divisor: contrarian_index/this = base chance to disagree. trust_center: trust values above this reduce contrarian chance. trust_divisor: how much trust above center reduces the chance (higher = less reduction).

emotion._docs: Emotion derivation. logic_threshold: logic_vs_emotion at or below this uses the 'emotional' pool; above uses the 'logical' pool.

engine._docs_history_window: How many recent logical_history entries to scan when checking if someone is under attack.

ally_defense._docs: Controls probabilistic ally defense for 'friendly' trust tier (55-74). friendly_probability_divisor: (trust - friendly_threshold) / this = bonus defend chance. friendly_base_chance: base probability added to the bonus chance.

reveal._docs: Controls role reveal decisions. Checked for ALL alive NPCs between every assertion round (not gated by speaker bids), so probabilities are per-round. pressure_base_chance: per-round probability for a real role holder to counter-reveal when someone claims their role. pressure_ad_divisor: assertion_drive/this is added to the base chance. wolf_pressure_performance_threshold: minimum performance for a wolf to consider counter-claiming under pressure. wolf_pressure_chance_divisor: performance/this = per-round wolf counter-claim probability. ga_voluntary_chance: per-round probability the GA reveals voluntarily when under attack and has protection history. coroner_wolf_finding_chance: per-round probability the coroner reveals when they have werewolf findings. coroner_no_wolf_chance: per-round probability the coroner reveals when they only have non-wolf findings. coroner_under_attack_bonus: added to reveal chance when the coroner is being accused.

debug._docs: Debug display toggles. show_logic: print engine decisions (intent, target, emotion, reasoning) in yellow/gray.

llm._docs: LLM backend configuration. backend: 'llamacpp' for local GGUF or 'ollama' for Ollama API. model_path: path to GGUF file (llamacpp only). chat_format: tokenizer chat template (llamacpp only). model: model name for Ollama. ollama_url: Ollama API endpoint.

logic._docs: Sampling parameters for engine/weaver LLM calls (analytical, low creativity). temperature: randomness (low = deterministic). min_p: minimum probability threshold. top_k: consider only top K tokens. repeat_penalty: penalizes token repetition.

narrative._docs: Sampling parameters for actor LLM calls (creative, expressive dialogue). temperature: randomness (higher = more varied). min_p: minimum probability threshold. top_k: consider only top K tokens. repeat_penalty: penalizes token repetition.
